name: Ubiquiti Camera AI 360
title: Ubiquiti Camera AI 360
short_description: PTZ Camera, 1920x1920, 30 FPS video, 5 MP CMOS sensor, 360° fisheye lens, IPX4, IK08
description: Elevate your surveillance capabilities with the UVC-AI-360, a high-resolution IP camera featuring a revolutionary fish-eye lens design that offers a remarkable 360° panoramic viewing angle. Tailored for areas with dynamic pedestrian activity, such as train stations, airports, shopping malls, schools, and universities, this state-of-the-art camera ensures comprehensive coverage without blind spots.

detailed_description.heading: 360° Panoramic Viewing
detailed_description.text: Elevate your surveillance capabilities with the UVC-AI-360, a high-resolution IP camera featuring a revolutionary fish-eye lens design that offers a remarkable 360° panoramic viewing angle. Tailored for areas with dynamic pedestrian activity, such as train stations, airports, shopping malls, schools, and universities, this state-of-the-art camera ensures comprehensive coverage without blind spots.

detailed_description.heading: Superior Image Quality
detailed_description.text: Delivering a crisp and fluid video output at 1920x1920 resolution and 30FPS, the UVC-AI-360 captures detailed images, setting a new standard for effective surveillance. The distinctive fish-eye lens allows the camera to monitor large areas with a single unit, providing unparalleled surveillance capabilities. This lens eliminates blind spots, ensuring a wide and detailed field of view. The high resolution and frame rate contribute to superior image quality, facilitating precise identification of objects and individuals. Efficient memory management, coupled with versatile applications, positions the UVC-AI-360 as an invaluable asset for enhanced security across diverse scenarios. With 2 GB LPDDR4 memory and support for up to 8GB eMMC flash memory, this camera combines cutting-edge technology with efficient data storage solutions.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Construction for Diverse Environments
detailed_description.text: Crafted from a blend of durable aluminium alloy and resilient polycarbonate, the UVC-AI-360 IP camera prioritizes robustness for various applications. Its housing is enhanced with a weather- and vandal-resistant design, holding IPX4 and IK08 ratings, making it adept for outdoor installations where exposure to rain or splashing water, as well as the risk of vandalism, are concerns. Measuring Ø147 x 49 mm and weighing 655 g without the bracket (685 g with the protective dome), this camera achieves a harmonious balance between compactness and robustness.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Image Processing and PoE
detailed_description.text: At the heart of the UVC-AI-360 is the Ambarella Advanced Image Processing SoC, ensuring high-quality image and video processing. It operates with a maximum power consumption of 8.6 W, as well as supports Power over Ethernet (PoE) (802.3af) for streamlined installation. This technology enables the transmission of both power and data over a single Ethernet cable, offering flexibility in camera placement and reducing the complexity and cost of installation.

detailed_description.heading: Certified Reliability & UniFi Protect
detailed_description.text: This device is backed by certifications from FCC, IC, and CE, guaranteeing compliance with stringent industry standards. These certifications, including FCC for the United States, IC for Canada, and CE for the European Union, affirm that the module meets essential requirements related to electromagnetic compatibility, radio frequency interference, and safety. This ensures that the device is a trusted component, delivering advanced capabilities for robust security systems without compromise.

detailed_description.heading: UniFi Protect Integration
detailed_description.text: Seamlessly integrate it into your security infrastructure using the UniFi Protect app. UniFi Protect, a surveillance management platform by Ubiquiti, provides users with powerful tools to manage and monitor their UniFi Protect cameras and devices. With centralized management, users can efficiently oversee multiple cameras and surveillance devices. The app offers live view and playback features, allowing users to monitor in real time and analyze recorded footage. Receive real-time alerts and notifications for events detected by the surveillance system, enhancing your ability to respond promptly. This feature is particularly beneficial for homeowners wanting to remotely monitor and secure their property. Additionally, businesses can utilize the app for effective surveillance of their premises, while public spaces, institutions, and commercial areas benefit from UniFi Protect in enhancing overall surveillance and safety.

items.name: Night Mode
items.value: IR LED Illumination and IR Cut Filter, IR Range up to 9 m
